narrative:
Monroe Twp township has 1,394 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
